element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic introduced immediately for basic enemy engagement

element_introduction_order.element: Standard monster enemies from Japanese mythology
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Fundamental threat type; establishes thematic baseline
Strategic resource; Japanese version caps at 3, international at 4 maximum carry
Progressive difficulty; Stage 4 boss notably harder (giant harpy/bird knight regionally different)
Stage 6 features stained-glass floor elements; adds spatial complexity
Climactic boss requiring mastery of all prior mechanics

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension with enemy waves building to boss encounters; difficulty escalates progressively across stages with notable spike at Stage 4

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible introduction with basic enemy types; Japanese version: 3 lives/1 bomb per credit; International Easy: 5 lives/3 bombs
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive enemy complexity and density increase; Stage 4 marks notable difficulty spike with harder boss encounter
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stage 6 introduces environmental complexity (stained-glass murals); final confrontation with Black Mantle requires mastery of all mechanics
notable_spikes: Stage 4 boss encounter (significantly harder than earlier stages)
Final stage environmental hazards combined with Black Mantle encounter

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage consists of enemy wave sequences culminating in a distinctive boss encounter; bosses are thematically tied to Japanese mythology
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stage 4: Giant harpy boss (international version: bird knight with armor)

notable_level_patterns.description: Later stages introduce unique visual and mechanical elements; Stage 6 features stained-glass floor murals creating spatial complexity
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stage 6: Stained-glass floor with demonic imagery (softened in international versions)

notable_level_patterns.description: Bomb availability (limited carry: 3 JP / 4 International) creates strategic decision points; regional balance adjustment increases international carry capacity
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All stages; particularly relevant for boss encounters

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - Pocky & Rocky article)
wikipedia (Pocky & Rocky series overview and game mechanics)
